title: DirectoryAccess
description: Schema for DirectoryAccess in Nuix REST API

readPermission.description: A boolean indicating whether the directory has read permission.

requiresRead.description: A boolean indicating whether the directory requires read permission.

writePermission.description: A boolean indicating whether the directory has write permission.

requiresWrite.description: A boolean indicating whether the directory requires write permission.

executePermission.description: A boolean indicating whether the directory has execute permission.

requiresExecute.description: A boolean indicating whether the directory requires execute permission.

ok.description: Boolean indicating the overall directory health.
